bundle: O12 XBRL pin-amendment / ratification bundle (EXP-1 findings)

entries.candidate_repair: INGESTION-side: store/index dim/member nodes so filer-cik contexts resolve, OR record a VALIDATED filer<->entity cik map at load. Possible future CERTIFIED recovery of the skipped AAL slice facts once a safe resolution ships. This is NOT an EXP-1 aliasing rule.
